metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Authentication ASIM filtering parser for Salesforce Service Cloud
properties.query:
let SalesforceUserType = datatable (UserType: string, TargetUserType: string)
[
    "Standard",              "Regular",
    "CloudIntegrationUser",  "Service",
    "SfdcAdmin",             "Admin",
    "S",                     "Regular",
    "X",                     "Other"
];
let SalesforceLoginStatus = datatable (
    LoginStatus: string,
    EventResult_lookup: string,
    EventResultDetails_lookup: string
)
[
    "LOGIN_NO_ERROR",                    "Success",  "",
    "LOGIN_TWOFACTOR_REQ",               "Failure",  "Logon violates policy",
    "OAUTH_UN_PW_FLOW_DISABLED",         "Failure",  "Logon violates policy",
    "LOGIN_ERROR_PASSWORD_LOCKOUT",      "Failure",  "User locked",
    "LOGIN_ERROR_INVALID_PASSWORD",      "Failure",  "Incorrect password",
    "OAUTH_CODE_CRED_SCOPE_TOO_LONG",   "Failure",  "Logon violates policy"
];
let SalesforceEventType = datatable (EventOriginalType: string, EventType: string)
[
    "Login",  "Logon",
    "LoginAs", "Logon",
    "Logout", "Logoff"
];
let parser = (
    starttime: datetime = datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime = datetime(null),
    username_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    targetappname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    srchostname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventtype_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventresultdetails_in: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventresult: string = '*',
    disabled: bool = false,
    pack: bool = false
)
{
    SalesforceServiceCloudV2_CL
    | where not(disabled)
    // -- Pre-filter on native columns for performance
    | where EventType in ("Login", "LoginAs", "Logout")
    // -- Time filters
    | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
        and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
    // -- Username filter (pre-filter on native fields)
    | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0)
        or (UserEmail has_any (username_has_any))
        or (User has_any (username_has_any))
    // -- Target app name filter
    | where (array_length(targetappname_has_any) == 0)
        or ('Salesforce Service Cloud' in~ (targetappname_has_any))
    // -- Source IP filter
    | where (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0)
        or (has_any_ipv4_prefix(SourceIp, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
        or (has_any_ipv4_prefix(ClientIp, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
    // -- Source hostname filter (not available in source)
    | where (array_length(srchostname_has_any) == 0)
    // -- Preserve original EventType and map
    | project-rename EventOriginalType = EventType
    | lookup SalesforceEventType on EventOriginalType
    // -- Event type filter (post-mapping)
    | where (array_length(eventtype_in) == 0) or (EventType in~ (eventtype_in))
    // -- Map LoginStatus to EventResult and EventResultDetails
    | lookup SalesforceLoginStatus on LoginStatus
    | extend
        EventResult = iff(isnotempty(EventResult_lookup), EventResult_lookup, iff(EventType == "Logoff", "Success", "Failure")),
        EventResultDetails = iff(isnotempty(EventResultDetails_lookup), EventResultDetails_lookup, "")
    | project-away EventResult_lookup, EventResultDetails_lookup
    // -- Event result details filter
    | where (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0) or (EventResultDetails in~ (eventresultdetails_in))
    // -- Event result filter
    | where (eventresult == "*" or (EventResult == eventresult))
    // -- Map UserType
    | lookup SalesforceUserType on UserType
    // -- Build ASIM fields
    | extend
        // -- Event fields (Mandatory)
        Type = "SalesforceServiceCloudV2_CL",
        EventCount            = int(1),
        EventStartTime        = coalesce(todatetime(TimestampDerived), TimeGenerated),
        EventEndTime          = coalesce(todatetime(TimestampDerived), TimeGenerated),
        EventSchema           = "Authentication",
        EventSchemaVersion    = "0.1.4",
        EventProduct          = "Salesforce Service Cloud",
        EventVendor           = "Salesforce",
        EventSeverity         = iff(EventResult == "Success", "Informational", "Low"),
        // -- Event fields (Optional)
        EventOriginalResultDetails = LoginStatus,
        EventUid              = RequestId,
        // -- Target User fields
        TargetUserId          = UserIdDerived,
        TargetUserIdType      = "SalesforceId",
        TargetUsername        = coalesce(UserEmail, User),
        TargetOriginalUserType = UserType,
        TargetSessionId       = SessionKey,
        // -- Source fields
        SrcIpAddr             = case(
                                    isnotempty(SourceIp) and SourceIp !has "Salesforce", SourceIp,
                                    isnotempty(ClientIp) and ClientIp !has "Salesforce", ClientIp,
                                    ""),
        // -- Dvc fields
        Dvc                   = "Salesforce Service Cloud",
        DvcOs                 = OsName,
        DvcOsVersion          = OsVersion,
        // -- Acting App fields
        ActingAppName         = coalesce(BrowserType, BrowserName),
        ActingAppType         = "Browser",
        // -- HTTP fields
        HttpUserAgent         = coalesce(UserAgent, HttpUserAgentOriginal, BrowserType),
        // -- Logon fields
        LogonMethod           = case(
                                    LoginStatus == "LOGIN_TWOFACTOR_REQ", "Multi factor authentication",
                                    Uri has "oauth2", "Service Principal",
                                    "Other"
                                ),
        LogonProtocol         = iff(isnotempty(TlsProtocol), strcat("HTTPS (", TlsProtocol, ")"), "HTTPS"),
        // -- Actor fields
        ActorUserId           = UserIdDerived,
        ActorUserIdType       = "SalesforceId",
        ActorUsername          = coalesce(UserEmail, User),
        ActorSessionId        = LoginKey,
        ActorScope            = OrganizationId,
        ActorUserType         = TargetUserType
    | extend
      TargetUsernameType    = case(
        TargetUsername has "@", "UPN",
        isnotempty(TargetUsername), "Simple",
        ""),
      ActorUsernameType     = case(
        ActorUsername has "@", "UPN",
        isnotempty(ActorUsername), "Simple",
        "")
    // -- Post-filter username after mapping
    | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or (TargetUsername has_any (username_has_any)) or (ActorUsername has_any (username_has_any))
    // -- ASimMatchingUsername
    | extend
        temp_isMatchTargetUsername = TargetUsername has_any (username_has_any),
        temp_isMatchActorUsername = ActorUsername has_any (username_has_any)
    | extend ASimMatchingUsername = case(
            array_length(username_has_any) == 0, "-",
            temp_isMatchTargetUsername and temp_isMatchActorUsername, "Both",
            temp_isMatchTargetUsername, "TargetUsername",
            temp_isMatchActorUsername, "ActorUsername",
            "No match"
        )
    // -- Aliases
    | extend
        User    = TargetUsername,
        IpAddr  = SrcIpAddr,
        Src     = SrcIpAddr,
        Dvc     = "Salesforce Service Cloud"
    // -- AdditionalFields
    | extend
        AdditionalFields = iff(
            pack,
            bag_pack(
                "ApiVersion",     ApiVersion,
                "CipherSuite",   CipherSuite,
                "TlsProtocol",   TlsProtocol,
                "SessionType",   SessionType,
                "PlatformType",  PlatformType,
                "DeviceId",      DeviceId,
                "DeviceModel",   DeviceModel,
                "DevicePlatform", DevicePlatform,
                "RequestId",     RequestId
            ),
            dynamic({})
        )
    // -- Project only ASIM fields
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        // -- Event fields
        EventCount,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventType,
        EventResult,
        EventResultDetails,
        EventOriginalType,
        EventOriginalResultDetails,
        EventProduct,
        EventVendor,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventSeverity,
        EventUid,
        // -- Target User fields
        TargetUserId,
        TargetUserIdType,
        TargetUsername,
        TargetUsernameType,
        TargetUserType,
        TargetOriginalUserType,
        TargetSessionId,
        // -- Actor fields
        ActorUserId,
        ActorUserIdType,
        ActorUsername,
        ActorUsernameType,
        ActorUserType,
        ActorSessionId,
        ActorScope,
        // -- Source fields
        SrcIpAddr,
        // -- Acting App fields
        ActingAppName,
        ActingAppType,
        // -- HTTP fields
        HttpUserAgent,
        // -- Logon fields
        LogonMethod,
        LogonProtocol,
        // -- Dvc fields
        Dvc,
        DvcOs,
        DvcOsVersion,
        // -- Aliases
        User,
        IpAddr,
        Src,
        // -- Matching
        ASimMatchingUsername,
        // -- Additional
        AdditionalFields,
        // -- Source table type
        Type
};
parser(
    starttime = starttime,
    endtime = endtime,
    username_has_any = username_has_any,
    targetappname_has_any = targetappname_has_any,
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix = srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    srchostname_has_any = srchostname_has_any,
    eventtype_in = eventtype_in,
    eventresultdetails_in = eventresultdetails_in,
    eventresult = eventresult,
    disabled = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
